{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Receptionist / Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "NSPRI Guest House - Our Hotel is a dynamic and multifaceted field that involves overseeing the operations of hotels, resorts, restaurants, and other lodging and hospitality establishments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist / Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Opportunity


	We are looking for an experienced person in this position above, to organize, and oversee the daily operations of our facilities and whilst maintaining the highest standards of customer service.


Qualifications


	The ideal candidate must have a good B.Sc., HND, OND, certificate in Business Administration, Secretariat Studies and any other Social Science from a recognized institution, administrative experience, Microsoft Office experience, strong communication skills, organizational abilities and data entry skills.


Requirements:


	The ideal candidate for the position must be smart, forward-looking with the ability to work with minimum supervision, and must be living around the Yaba and Mushin axis.


Salary
Attractive.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should their comprehensive CV, contact address (not P.O. Box) with a functional e-mail address and other relevant details to Head, Corporate to: recruitment@robertjohnsonholdings.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Receptionist / Front Desk Officer Job at NSPRI Guest House




        
    

        
        NSPRI Guest House - Our Hotel is a dynamic and multifaceted field that involves overseeing the operations of hotels, resorts, restaurants, and other lodging and hospitality establishments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist / Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Opportunity


	We are looking for an experienced person in this position above, to organize, and oversee the daily operations of our facilities and whilst maintaining the highest standards of customer service.


Qualifications
     

            
    




	The ideal candidate must have a good B.Sc., HND, OND, certificate in Business Administration, Secretariat Studies and any other Social Science from a recognized institution, administrative experience, Microsoft Office experience, strong communication skills, organizational abilities and data entry skills.


Requirements:


	The ideal candidate for the position must be smart, forward-looking with the ability to work with minimum supervision, and must be living around the Yaba and Mushin axis.


Salary
Attractive.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should their comprehensive CV, contact address (not P.O. Box) with a functional e-mail address and other relevant details to Head, Corporate to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fleet Supervisor (Corporate Client)",
  "description": "Human Edge Dimension Consulting is a modern HR consulting firm dedicated to helping startups, small businesses, and growing enterprises build strong human capital foundations. Founded in 2022, our company was born out of a clear need: to make expert-level HR support accessible, affordable, and impactful for businesses in their early growth stages.

We bring a fresh, innovative perspective to HR strategy&mdash;combining legal compliance with people-first practices. Whether you&#39;re hiring your first employee or restructuring a growing team, we deliver flexible solutions that evolve with your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Supervisor (Corporate Client)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Operations
Line Manager: Head, Operations
Direct Reports: Pilots

Job Summary


	The job incumbent is responsible for managing drivers.
	Ensures a high level of customer service, monitors and tracks performance.
	Builds and maintains cordial relationship with existing business clients. Monitors fuel usage and maintains maintenance schedule.


Roles and Responsibilities


	Ensures all vehicles are in good condition and readily available for clients&rsquo; use;
	Ensures proper management and engagement of drivers;
	Schedules regular vehicle maintenance to ensure operational efficiency;
	Prepares reports on parts and labour expenses;
	Ensures vehicles are used according to laid down usage rules and regulations;
	Carries out periodic checks and inspection on vehicles and drivers;
	Provides drivers with information about the company&rsquo;s values and culture and ensures adherence;
	Determines the type and extent of repairs required on vehicles;
	Able to use past records to forecast maintenance and fuel requirements of vehicles;
	Schedule&rsquo;s repair of parts considering time requirements and vehicle downtime;
	Maintains an automated system that notifies upcoming vehicle paper renewal;
	Tracks daily mileage at the beginning and close of business in order to monitor commute and travel;
	Provides report on monthly fuel usage;
	Ensures vehicle particulars are up to date and tracks expiration to ensure compliance with FRSC;
	Ensures drivers&rsquo; licence and other registration are up to date;
	Interfaces with clients&rsquo; representatives to get feedback on performance and identify other possible business solutions they can render;
	Advises the company on how to improve the service delivery to its clients;
	Provides recommendation on vehicles, based on usage and needs analysis.


Key Requirements
Qualifications:


	HND or a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Transportation and Logistics from a reputable and accredited institution.
	Must have undergone a relevant course in fleet management, preferably with the Chartered Institute of Logistics and Transport (Nigeria).


Work Experience:


	1-3 years of work experience in a similar role.


Technical Knowledge Area:


	Proficiency in the use of Fleet management software.
	Ability to drive in a professional manner.
	Knowledge of road network.
	Basic technical knowledge of cars.


Competencies Required:


	Leading and supervising.
	Working with people.
	Relating and networking.
	Persuading and influencing.
	Presenting and communicating information.
	Writing and reporting.
	Analysing.
	Planning and organizing.
	Delivering results and meeting customer expectations.
	Coping with pressures and setbacks.
	Achieving personal work goals and objectives.


Remuneration
Attractive.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application to: humanedgeconsulting02@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-05",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Fleet Supervisor (Corporate Client) Job at Human Edge Dimension Consulting




        
    

        
        Human Edge Dimension Consulting is a modern HR consulting firm dedicated to helping startups, small businesses, and growing enterprises build strong human capital foundations. Founded in 2022, our company was born out of a clear need: to make expert-level HR support accessible, affordable, and impactful for businesses in their early growth stages.

We bring a fresh, innovative perspective to HR strategy—combining legal compliance with people-first practices. Whether you're hiring your first employee or restructuring a growing team, we deliver flexible solutions that evolve with your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Supervisor (Corporate Client)
     

            
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Operations
Line Manager: Head, Operations
Direct Reports: Pilots

Job Summary


	The job incumbent is responsible for managing drivers.
	Ensures a high level of customer service, monitors and tracks performance.
	Builds and maintains cordial relationship with existing business clients. Monitors fuel usage and maintains maintenance schedule.


Roles and Responsibilities


	Ensures all vehicles are in good condition and readily available for clients’ use;
	Ensures proper management and engagement of drivers;
	Schedules regular vehicle maintenance to ensure operational efficiency;
	Prepares reports on parts and labour expenses;
	Ensures vehicles are used according to laid down usage rules and regulations;
	Carries out periodic checks and inspection on vehicles and drivers;
	Provides drivers with information about the company’s values and culture and ensures adherence;
	Determines the type and extent of repairs required on vehicles;
	Able to use past records to forecast maintenance and fuel requirements of vehicles;
	Schedule’s repair of parts considering time requirements and vehicle downtime;
	Maintains an automated system that notifies upcoming vehicle paper renewal;
	Tracks daily mileage at the beginning and close of business in order to monitor commute and travel;
	Provides report on monthly fuel usage;
	Ensures vehicle particulars are up to date and tracks expiration to ensure compliance with FRSC;
	Ensures drivers’ licence and other registration are up to date;
	Interfaces with clients’ representatives to get feedback on performance and identify other possible business solutions they can render;
	Advises the company on how to improve the service delivery to its clients;
	Provides recommendation on vehicles, based on usage and needs analysis.


Key Requirements
Qualifications:


	HND or a Bachelor’s Degree in Transportation and Logistics from a reputable and accredited institution.
	Must have undergone a relevant course in fleet management, preferably with the Chartered Institute of Logistics and Transport (Nigeria).


Work Experience:


	1-3 years of work experience in a similar role.


Technical Knowledge Area:


	Proficiency in the use of Fleet management software.
	Ability to drive in a professional manner.
	Knowledge of road network.
	Basic technical knowledge of cars.


Competencies Required:


	Leading and supervising.
	Working with people.
	Relating and networking.
	Persuading and influencing.
	Presenting and communicating information.
	Writing and reporting.
	Analysing.
	Planning and organizing.
	Delivering results and meeting customer expectations.
	Coping with pressures and setbacks.
	Achieving personal work goals and objectives.


Remuneration
Attractive.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Administrative and Sales Person Job at RDT Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        RDT Solutions Limited is a leading Information and Communication Technology (ICT) company dedicated to providing innovative, reliable, and cost-effective technology solutions for individuals, businesses, government agencies, educational institutions, and corporate organizations.

Founded with a vision to bridge the technology gap and drive digital transformation, we specialize in delivering cutting-edge IT solutions, security systems, renewable energy solutions, and digital services that enhance productivity, security, efficiency, and business growth. Our team consists of highly skilled professionals with extensive experience in technology deployment, system integration, technical support, and digital innovation.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative and Sales Person

Job Location: Itire-Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Working Days: Monday – Friday

About the Role


	We are looking for a smart, organized, customer-oriented, and results-driven Administrative & Sales Person to support daily administrative operations, attend to customers, and promote our IT products and services.


Key Responsibilities


	Attend to walk-in and online customer inquiries professionally.
	Promote and sell laptops, gadgets, and other IT solutions.
	Process POS transactions, bill payments, subscriptions, and other digital services.
	Prepare quotations, invoices, and maintain proper documentation.
	Keep accurate records of sales, inventory, and transactions.
	Handle general administrative duties and office operations.
	Support basic marketing and social media activities.
	Build and maintain excellent customer relationships.
	Assist in achieving monthly sales targets.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in any relevant discipline.
	Good knowledge of laptops, desktops, and computer accessories.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, and Outlook).
	Knowledge of graphic design (Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or CorelDRAW) will be an added advantage.
	Honest, responsible, organized, and self-motivated.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Must reside in Itire-Surulere or its environs.
	Female candidates are encouraged to apply.


Salary
N60,000 – N80,000 monthly (Based on experience and performance).

What We Offer


	Company laptop for official duties.
	Competitive salary.
	Attractive commission on laptop and gadget sales.
	Additional commission on projects and services secured.
	Continuous learning and professional development.
	Career growth opportunities within the company.
	Friendly and supportive work environment.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Administrative & Sales Person" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Manager",
  "description": "Sales Force Consulting - Our client, a Major Iron-rod, Steel Dealership Company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Manager

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Interview mode: Physical

Job Summary


	The Inventory Manager is responsible for all raw materialintakes and finished goods warehousing and management leveraging all inventory management principles and procedures to ensure accuracy and ease of reconciliation.


Core Responsibilities


	Apply business knowledge to optimize inventory parameter setting.
	Manage and control inventory levels in line with targets, while supporting business needs.
	Ensure proper inventory documentationprocedures.
	Apply all inventory management principles.


Qualifications / Experience


	Degree/HND in any Business related course.
	Minimum of ten years experience in inventory management from a reputable steel dealership company.


Other Conditions:


	Ideal candidates should presently reside in Ikeja or Alimosho LGA or environ.
	They should be ready to be interviewed Physically within one.


Inventory management skills.


	Ability to work independently with little supervision.
	Business Acumen.
	Attention to details.
	Use of computer.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send only their CV (PDF or Word) to: salesforceconsultingng@gmail.com using &ldquo;Inventory Manager - Steel&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note


	Enquiries: Text or Whatsapp 08120796570. No calls
	Only candidates who meet set criteria shall be shortlisted for interview.

Inventory Manager Job at Sales Force Consulting




        
    

        
        Sales Force Consulting - Our client, a Major Iron-rod, Steel Dealership Company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Manager

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Interview mode: Physical

Job Summary


	The Inventory Manager is responsible for all raw materialintakes and finished goods warehousing and management leveraging all inventory management principles and procedures to ensure accuracy and ease of reconciliation.


Core Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Apply business knowledge to optimize inventory parameter setting.
	Manage and control inventory levels in line with targets, while supporting business needs.
	Ensure proper inventory documentationprocedures.
	Apply all inventory management principles.


Qualifications / Experience


	Degree/HND in any Business related course.
	Minimum of ten years experience in inventory management from a reputable steel dealership company.


Other Conditions:


	Ideal candidates should presently reside in Ikeja or Alimosho LGA or environ.
	They should be ready to be interviewed Physically within one.


Inventory management skills.


	Ability to work independently with little supervision.
	Business Acumen.
	Attention to details.
	Use of computer.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send only their CV (PDF or Word) to: [email protected] using “Inventory Manager - Steel" as the subject of the email.

Note


	Enquiries: Text or Whatsapp 08120796570. No calls
	Only candidates who meet set criteria shall be shortlisted for interview.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Engineering Manager",
  "description": "EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources is a dynamic, multi-sector business dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable solutions across the energy, real estate, and general trading industries. The company specializes in solar energy sales and services, providing sustainable and cost-effective power solutions to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineering Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Research and develop designs and products
	Determine the need for training and talent development
	Hire contractors and build teams
	Ensure products have the support of upper management
	Provide clear and concise instructions to engineering teams
	Lead research and development projects that produce new designs, products, and processes.
	Check their team&rsquo;s work for technical accuracy
	Coordinate work with other managers and staff


Requirements


	Relevant training and/or certifications as an Engineering Manager
	Analytical skills for evaluating information carefully and solving complex problems
	Communication skills for overseeing staff and working with other management personnel
	Detail-oriented with the ability to catch minor errors which can result in major problems
	Math skills, including calculus and other advanced mathematics
	Organizational skills for keeping track of various budgets, employees, and schedules simultaneously.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: integratedresourcesemadorniger@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-30",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-22",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",

Engineering Manager Job at EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources




        
    

        
        EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources is a dynamic, multi-sector business dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable solutions across the energy, real estate, and general trading industries. The company specializes in solar energy sales and services, providing sustainable and cost-effective power solutions to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineering Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Research and develop designs and products
	Determine the need for training and talent development
	Hire contractors and build teams
	Ensure products have the support of upper management
	Provide clear and concise instructions to engineering teams
	Lead research and development projects that produce new designs, products, and processes.
	Check their team’s work for technical accuracy
	Coordinate work with other managers and staff


Requirements


	Relevant training and/or certifications as an Engineering Manager
	Analytical skills for evaluating information carefully and solving complex problems
	Communication skills for overseeing staff and working with other management personnel
	Detail-oriented with the ability to catch minor errors which can result in major problems
	Math skills, including calculus and other advanced mathematics
	Organizational skills for keeping track of various budgets, employees, and schedules simultaneously.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
